settings.title: About Us
settings.subtitle: Crafting fragrances rooted in tradition, devotion, and timeless luxury.
settings.body: Anand Rasa was born from a simple belief: fragrance is not just scent — it is identity, devotion, and cosmic connection. We are India's astrology-inspired fragrance house, handcrafting luxury alcohol-free attars, zodiac perfume oils, planet fragrances, agarbatti, and spiritual incense rooted in Vedic tradition. Every bottle carries the intention of its celestial alignment — from the fiery confidence of a Mars attar to the serene calm of a Moon fragrance. Our perfumers blend rare natural ingredients using time-honoured distillation methods, creating skin-close aromas designed for meditation, pooja, and daily ritual. Based in Gurugram, Haryana, we honour the ancient Indian art of attar-making while bringing it to a modern, design-conscious audience.
